title: Services Swiss movers often compare for the Netherlands
intro: Housing, relocation help, banking, and insurance usually come before any immigration-law services for typical Swiss-citizen moves.

items.reason: Short and mid-term listings while you secure a long-term rental.
Digital Dutch banking after address and BSN.
CHF and EUR movement and first-month cash flow across the border.
Compare Dutch basic health insurance once you are resident.
